changeSet.author: hdim-platform-team
changeSet.comment:
Fix dosage_instruction column type mismatch in medication_requests table.
Schema Drift Issue: MedicationRequestEntity entity declares dosage_instruction as JSONB (@JdbcTypeCode(SqlTypes.JSON), columnDefinition="jsonb") but the Liquibase migration (0004-create-medication-requests-table.xml) created it as TEXT, causing runtime schema validation failure: "wrong column type encountered".
This migration aligns the actual database schema with the entity definition.
